items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Revocation when vendor compromised'. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the scenario has been executed or that the expected results have been captured. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not include any specific data or outcomes related to this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status regarding its validation.
